message:
refactor: extract GITHUB_USERNAME to shared constants module

Consolidate the GitHub username constant that was duplicated across:
- app/api/github-heartbeat/route.ts (API route)
- components/github-heartbeat.tsx (client component)

Now both import from lib/constants.ts, ensuring consistency and making
it trivial to update the username in one place if needed. This follows
the DRY principle and prevents potential drift between server and
client-side references.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
